retry_reason: The refcount decrement always succeeds; there is no failure mode to retry. If the refcount was already zero, that indicates a use-after-free bug, not a transient condition.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases a reference on a btrfs_block_group. When the reference count reaches zero, the function frees the block_group and its associated resources (free_space_ctl, physical_map). After calling btrfs_put_block_group, the caller must not use the block_group pointer, as it may be freed. No locking or RCU requirements are imposed by this function itself; the caller must ensure proper synchronization to avoid races on the refcount. The function includes debug WARN_ON checks to verify invariants, but these do not alter the put semantics.
